'''Eela Valotta''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who was an agent of the so-called "[[Freedom Convoy]]" during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Her associate was [[Tray'la Sheek]]. She was wanted by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] for kidnapping several Twi'leks from the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] personal harem. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]], which was 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] if Valotta was brought in alive and 1,500 if she was brought in dead, was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
